title: Allowable Fenestration and Door Area
full_text:
3.2.1.4 Allowable Fenestration and Door Area
Allowable Fenestration and Door Area
1) The maximum allowable total vertical fenestration and door area to gross wall
area ratio (FDWR), determined in accordance with Article 3.1.1.6., shall be as follows:
where
HDD = the heating degree-days of the location of the building determined according
to Sentence 1.1.4.1.(1).
(See Note A-3.2.1.4.(1).)
2) The total skylight area shall be less than 2% of the gross roof area as determined
in Article 3.1.1.6.

sentences.text: The maximum allowable total vertical fenestration and door area to gross wall area ratio (FDWR), determined in accordance with Article 3.1.1.6., shall be as follows: where HDD = the heating degree-days of the location of the building determined according to Sentence 1.1.4.1.(1). (See Note A-3.2.1.4.(1).)
The total skylight area shall be less than 2% of the gross roof area as determined in Article 3.1.1.6.
